note: Replace these placeholders with present and historic facts people in your country can verify. Local-first content builds trust.

present.title: Add a present local fact
present.detail: Something happening now or this season that people can check against official sources.
present.verify: Name the official map, bulletin, or agency page.

historic.title: Add a historic anchor people remember
historic.detail: A past event in living memory that explains why prep matters here.
historic.verify: Point to official records or widely known national inquiries.

prep: List practical household steps that work in your country
Name the official alert apps people should install
